question.content: A charged particle returns to hole a after moving in a uniform magnetic field for exactly T0. Determine the magnetic flux density magnitude using one cyclotron period relation only. Answer format: one final result only. If the result naturally simplifies to a single value, give that value; otherwise give a single algebraic expression using the symbols defined in the problem. Use ASCII characters only. Do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign. Answer format: a single magnetic-field expression or numerical value; do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign.

step_1.content: Use the return condition to identify that motion in magnetic field corresponds to one full cyclotron period.
step_1.key_point: Set T0 equal to the circular-motion period in uniform magnetic field.

step_3.content: Combine omega=qB/m with T=2pi/omega and substitute T=T0.
step_3.key_point: Isolate B as a single expression in m, q, T0.
